checks.name: engine_eval
checks.detail:
Carevo Route Engine — eval
  Cases:            104
  Exact match:      84 (81%)
  Acceptable:       104 (100%)
  Under-triaged:    0
  SAFETY FAILURES:  0 (red-flag cases under-triaged)

EVOI interview policy:
  ✓ P1 vague cardiac → asks first, targets redFlag:chest_pressure
  ✓ P2 fully-known mild case → decides immediately (conf 0.54)
  ✓ P3 out of budget → decides (confident: 0.79)
  ✓ P4 ER red flag present → interview stops immediately
  ✓ P5 mental-health case → never probes suicidal ideation
  ✓ P7 emergency tiers: bare chest pain interviews, ACS wording hard-stops
  ✓ P7b neuro presentation → asks focused red-flag ladder (redFlag:one_sided_weakness)
  ✓ P8 infant-fever backstop: deterministic detection, no LLM dependency
  ✓ P9 softened self-harm phrasing reaches the crisis flow
  ✓ P11 calibration: applies clean, refuses on boundary/red-flag/floor/ER (8 patterns, carevo-calibration-2026-07-16.1)
  ✓ P6 combination rule fires without any reported red flag
  ✓ P10 severe-dehydration backstop: cant-keep-fluids-down + vomiting/orthostatic detected
  ✓ P12 cost engine: 911-silent, fail-closed, sourced, benefit ladder correct (carevo-rates-2026.07.0-seed)
  ✓ P13 thin-information safeguards: vague detection + up-only never-home-care floor
  ✓ P14 Paul downward guards: explicit-absence semantics, fail-closed (2 guards)
  ✓ P15 limited-English fever safety: fever language never ends at home care
  ✓ P16 raw floors vs real-world phrasing (NEJM45): abbreviations reach the nets, negations do not
  ✓ P17 red-flag combos: 15 symptom+modifier guards ask focused safety questions

Knowledge retrieval:
  ✓ R1 cardiac → AHA warning signs (doc.aha.heart#1, score 1)
  ✓ R2 infant fever → pediatric chunks (doc.aap.infant#1, doc.aap.fever#1)
  ✓ R3 content-type isolation holds (self_care → mlp.dehydration#2, mlp.dehydration#3)
  ✓ R4 pregnancy → ACOG guidance
  ✓ R5 provenance complete on every retrieved chunk
  ✓ R6 retrieval deterministic

Knowledge graph consistency:
  591 nodes · 1005 edges · 444 chunks · 24 rules · warning-signs coverage 11/11 systems
  ⚠ 444/444 chunks not clinician-reviewed yet
  ✓ no wiring errors (every red flag floors, every screen routes, every citation resolves)

Property-based safety (feature grid):
  grid points: 704 · checks: 528 severity + 2112 red-flag + 2112 risk-modifier = 4752
  ✓ severity monotonicity holds everywhere
  ✓ red-flag dominance holds everywhere
  ✓ risk modifiers never lower acuity

PASS

manualLaunchRequirements: Apply the REE PostgreSQL migration in staging and production.
Set REE_TELEMETRY_ENABLED=1 only after REE_TELEMETRY_ENDPOINT writes to encrypted PostgreSQL.
Run the full dataset juror gate with a healthy LLM provider before launch.
